io.sensor.community.SensorInfo.name: SensorInfo
io.sensor.community.SensorInfo.description: Reference data for a Sensor.Community sensor node including its hardware type and last known location metadata.

io.sensor.community.SensorReading.name: SensorReading
io.sensor.community.SensorReading.description: Latest Sensor.Community telemetry reading for one sensor at a specific timestamp, normalized across particulate, climate, pressure, and noise measurements.

SensorInfo.name: SensorInfo
SensorInfo.description: Schema for Sensor.Community sensor reference data, capturing the stable sensor identifier, hardware type, and latest known location metadata published in the Airrohr API payload.

sensor_id.description: Stable integer identifier of the Sensor.Community sensor device. This value is used as the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

sensor_type_id.description: Numeric upstream identifier for the sensor hardware type, such as the Sensor.Community type id for SDS011 or BME280.

sensor_type_name.description: Upstream sensor hardware type name published under sensor.sensor_type.name, for example SDS011, SPS30, BME280, or DHT22.

sensor_type_manufacturer.description: Manufacturer name published by Sensor.Community for the sensor hardware type, taken from sensor.sensor_type.manufacturer.

pin.description: Sensor pin designation reported by the upstream payload under sensor.pin.

location_id.description: Stable integer identifier of the Sensor.Community location object associated with the reading.

latitude.description: Latitude of the sensor location in WGS84 decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Longitude of the sensor location in WGS84 decimal degrees.

altitude.description: Altitude of the sensor location in meters above sea level when supplied by the upstream payload.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code published in the Sensor.Community location record.

indoor.description: True when the upstream location.indoor flag marks the sensor as indoor; false when the sensor is marked as outdoor.

SensorReading.name: SensorReading
SensorReading.description: Schema for the latest normalized Sensor.Community telemetry reading for a single sensor and timestamp, covering particulate matter, temperature, humidity, pressure, and supported noise measurements.

sensor_id.description: Stable integer identifier of the Sensor.Community sensor device. This value is used as the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp published by Sensor.Community for the reading in the format YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss.

sensor_type_name.description: Upstream sensor hardware type name published under sensor.sensor_type.name for the device that emitted the reading.

pm10_ug_m3.description: Particulate matter mass concentration for PM10 in micrograms per cubic meter when the upstream feed publishes value type P1.

pm2_5_ug_m3.description: Particulate matter mass concentration for PM2.5 in micrograms per cubic meter when the upstream feed publishes value type P2.

pm1_0_ug_m3.description: Particulate matter mass concentration for PM1.0 in micrograms per cubic meter when the upstream feed publishes value type P0, typically for SPS30-family sensors.

pm4_0_ug_m3.description: Particulate matter mass concentration for PM4.0 in micrograms per cubic meter when the upstream feed publishes value type P4, typically for SPS30-family sensors.

temperature_celsius.description: Ambient temperature measurement in degrees Celsius when the upstream feed publishes value type temperature.

humidity_percent.description: Relative humidity in percent when the upstream feed publishes value type humidity.

pressure_pa.description: Atmospheric pressure in pascals when the upstream feed publishes value type pressure.

pressure_sealevel_pa.description: Atmospheric pressure reduced to sea level in pascals when the upstream feed publishes value type pressure_at_sealevel.

noise_laeq_db.description: Equivalent continuous sound level in A-weighted decibels when the upstream feed publishes value type noise_LAeq.

noise_la_min_db.description: Minimum A-weighted sound level in decibels when the upstream feed publishes value type noise_LA_min.

noise_la_max_db.description: Maximum A-weighted sound level in decibels when the upstream feed publishes value type noise_LA_max.
